zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Blois-Châtillon I於1345年2月5日出生在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南恭勒-拉其時，他的父親Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON26歲，母親Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE25歲。他於1387年1月20日與Marguerite de Clisson在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安蒙可度爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1404年1月16日在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫藍巴勒享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Blois-Châtillon I于1345年2月5日出生在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南恭勒-拉其时，他的父亲Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON26岁，母亲Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE25岁。他于1387年1月20日与Marguerite de Clisson在法国努維勒-阿吉泰維安蒙可度爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1404年1月16日在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫藍巴勒享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Blois-Châtillon I was born on 5 February 1345, in Jugon-les-Lacs, Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, his father, Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON, was 26 and his mother, Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE, was 25. He married Marguerite de Clisson on 20 January 1387, in Moncontour, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 16 January 1404, in Lamballe, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Blois-Châtillon I est né le 5 février 1345, à Jugon-les-Lacs, Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, son père, Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite de Clisson le 20 janvier 1387, à Moncontour, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 16 janvier 1404, à Lamballe, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Blois-Châtillon I am 5. Februar 1345 in Jugon-les-Lacs, Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON 26 und seine Mutter Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE 25. Er hat am 20. Januar 1387 in Moncontour, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Marguerite de Clisson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 16. Januar 1404 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Lamballe, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Blois-Châtillon I è nato il il 5 febbraio 1345 nel Jugon-les-Lacs, Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite de Clisson il 20 gennaio 1387, nel Moncontour, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 16 gennaio 1404, nel Lamballe, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Blois-Châtillon Iが1345年2月5日にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーディナンジュゴン-レス-ラクスで生まれた時，父Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLONは26歳，母Jeanne de PENTHIÈVREは25歳であった。1387年1月20日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンモンコントウルでMarguerite de Clissonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1404年1月16日にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーランボールで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Blois-Châtillon I(이)가 1345년 2월 5일 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 딘아 저곤-레스-라c스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1387년 1월 20일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 몬콘토우르에서 Marguerite de Clisson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1404년 1월 16일 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 램알에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.5 February 1345–16 January 1404: 1345 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 5–1404 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 16

pt.5 February 1345–16 January 1404: 5 de fevereiro de 1345–16 de janeiro de 1404
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Blois-Châtillon I nasceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1345, em Jugon-les-Lacs, Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite de Clisson em 20 de janeiro de 1387, em Moncontour, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1404, em Lamballe, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Blois-Châtillon I родился 5 февраля 1345 г. в местности джугон-лес-лакс, динан, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite de Clisson 20 января 1387 г. в местности монконтоур, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 16 января 1404 г. в местности лэмбалл, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 58 лет.

es.5 February 1345–16 January 1404: 5 de febrero de 1345–16 de enero de 1404
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Blois-Châtillon I nació el 5 de febrero de 1345, en Jugon-les-Lacs, Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Marguerite de Clisson el 20 de enero de 1387, en Moncontour, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 16 de enero de 1404, en Lamballe, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 58 años.
